evals.prompt: Write a LinkedIn post for @CitadelAI targeting HVAC company owners about their after-hours call problem.
evals.expected_output: Open with a specific story hook (not generic question), include proof numbers (318 calls/127 appointments), no external links in body, question CTA, 3-5 specific hashtags.
expectations: The response opens with a story, bold claim, or curiosity gap not a generic question
The response includes specific proof numbers (318 calls, 127 appointments, or 8-second response)
The response contains no external links in the post body
The response ends with a question to drive comments
The response includes 3-5 specific hashtags (not generic like #business)

evals.prompt: I published a LinkedIn post 2 hours ago. It has 45 likes but only 3 comments and very low reach. What went wrong?
evals.expected_output: Diagnose missed first-60-minute engagement window, check external link suppression, and give immediate recovery actions.
expectations: The response identifies the missed first-60-minute engagement window as the primary cause
The response checks whether the post body contained an external link (LinkedIn suppression)
The response gives immediate recovery actions (reply to all 3 comments now)
The response recommends a follow-up comment with the link instead of editing the post

evals.prompt: Build a 30-day LinkedIn content plan for @CitadelAI to generate inbound SMB leads.
evals.expected_output: 4 posts/week rotating story/expertise/opinion/data, targeting dental/HVAC/home services, rotating CTAs, daily engagement routine.
expectations: The response specifies 4 posts per week rotating all 4 post types
The response targets specific verticals: dental, home services, HVAC, or real estate
The response rotates CTAs: DM for audit, book Calendly, link in comments
The response includes a daily engagement routine (5-10 comments before posting)
The response specifies no external links in post bodies
